subject: [PATCH v2 09/13] sunrpc: add netlink upcall for the auth.unix.gid cache

2026-03-25.patch_summary: This patch adds support for netlink-based cache upcalls for the unix_gid (auth.unix.gid) cache in the sunrpc subsystem. It introduces new attributes and operations to the sunrpc_cache YAML spec, including a new attribute-set for unix_gids and two new operations: unix-gid-get-reqs and unix-gid-set-reqs. The patch also implements netlink-based upcalls for these operations, allowing userspace to dump pending requests and respond to them. This is done by introducing new functions that snapshot pending requests, parse responses from userspace, and update the cache accordingly.
